plugin.description: Draws map, minimap icons, POI markers, and optional paths over the game.
button.reset_reached_paths.tooltip: Show all paths and runestone socket counts for the current map again.
icon_picker.window: Icon Picker (Double click to select an item)
icons.abyss.help: Icons for Abyss nodes. 'Other' matches any remaining Abyss-path entity.
icons.base_game.help: Blockages icon can be set from Delve Icons category i.e. 'Blockage OR DelveWall'
icons.breach.help: Breach bosses are same as BaseGame Icons -> Unique Monsters.
icons.expedition_marker.help: Icons for expedition markers, keyed by MinimapIcon name. Set size to 0 to disable.
icons.expedition_model_marker.help: Icons for expedition markers detected by their .ao model (works before detonation). Set size to 0 to disable.
icons.expedition_remnant.help: Icons for expedition remnants with specific mods. Set size to 0 to disable.
icons.sekhemas.help: Icons for Sanctum (Trial of the Sekhemas) objects.
icons.strongboxes.help: Icons for specific Strongbox chests, matched by entity path.
icons.temple.help: Icons for Incursion Waygate devices (Vaal Ruins).
poi.common_all_areas: Important Terrain POIs common for all Areas
settings.auto_detect_coop.tooltip: Automatically detects when you are playing local co-op in controller mode and adjusts map centering.
settings.culling_fullscreen: Make Culling Window Cover Whole Game
settings.enable_coop_centering: Enable Local Co-op Map Hack Centering
settings.enable_coop_centering.tooltip: Centers the map/maphack on the midpoint of P1 and P2 when playing co-op.
settings.full_recompute_interval.tooltip: How often a full path recompute is forced, ignoring the segment-skip optimization. Ensures paths never get stuck stale.
settings.hide_background: Hide Radar when game is in the background
settings.hide_network_bubble: Hide Entities outside the network bubble
settings.hide_paused: Hide Radar when game is paused
settings.hide_reached_paths: Hide reached paths for current map
settings.hide_reached_paths.tooltip: When you get close to a path target (entity, terrain POI or tile), its path stops being drawn for the rest of the current map. Resets automatically on area change.
settings.hide_runestone_socket: Hide Runestone socket count when near
settings.hide_runestone_socket.tooltip: When you get close to a Runestone Encounter, its socket-count label disappears for the rest of the map. Uses the Reached Distance below. Independent of 'Hide reached paths'.
settings.intro: If your mini/large map icon are not working/visible. Open this setting window, click anywhere on it and then hide this setting window. It will fix the issue.
settings.large_map_fix.tooltip: This slider is for fixing large map (icons) offset. You have to use it if you feel that LargeMap Icons are moving while your player is moving. You only have to find a value that works for you per game window resolution. Basically, you don't have to change it unless you change your game window resolution. Also, please contribute back, let me know what resolution you use and what value works best for you. This slider has no impact on mini-map icons. For windowed-full-screen default value should be good enough. If you want to add precise value (e.g. 0.137345) press CTRL + LMB
settings.large_map_x_offset.tooltip: Adjusts only the large map overlay horizontally. Negative moves it left, positive moves it right.
settings.large_map_y_offset.tooltip: Adjusts only the large map overlay vertically. Negative moves it up, positive moves it down.
settings.mini_map_x_offset.tooltip: Adjusts only the mini-map overlay horizontally. Negative moves it left, positive moves it right.
settings.mini_map_zoom.tooltip: Controls how far mini-map icons sit from your character (the mini-map's effective zoom).
settings.path_recompute_interval.tooltip: How often paths are recomputed. Lower = more responsive, higher = less CPU usage.
settings.path_recompute_segments.tooltip: 0 = full recompute every cycle. Set to 3-5 to only recompute the first few segments of a cached path, reusing the tail. Higher values = faster but paths may be slightly stale when the player moves.
settings.poi_background: Add black background to Terrain POI text
settings.reached_distance.tooltip: Grid distance at which a path target / runestone counts as reached.
settings.runestone_socket_offset.tooltip: Screen-pixel offset for the Runestone socket-count number.
settings.show_icon_paths.tooltip: Global on/off for entity-icon pathing. Does not affect individual icon path settings.
settings.show_player_names.tooltip: This button will not work while Player is in the Scourge.
settings.show_smooth_path: Show A* Smooth Path to POIs
settings.show_smooth_path.tooltip: Computes and draws the actual shortest walkable path (cyan).
settings.show_straight_line.tooltip: Draws a straight line+arrow to each POI. Green = clear, Red = blocked.
settings.show_terrain_poi: Show terrain points of interest (A.K.A Terrain POI)
window.large_map_culling.help: This is a culling window for the large map icons. Any large map icons outside of this window will be hidden automatically. Feel free to change the position/size of this window. Once you are happy with the dimensions, double click this window. You can bring this window back from the settings menu.
